title: Jane S -Executive Interview | Chief of Staff - Ops & Special Projects
meeting_title: Jane S -Executive Interview | Chief of Staff - Ops & Special Projects

transcript.text: Thank you.
Hey.
Hi, Marcel.
How are you?
Good.
How's it going?
Good.
Good.
It's only Wednesday, but it feels like it's been a lot of a longer week.
It is only Wednesday.
You're right.
Hey, sorry to be a couple minutes late.
Give me just one second.
I'm just getting a cup of coffee.
I'll be right back.
Yeah, take your time.
Thank you.
All right.
How's your Wednesday going?
It's busy, not going to lie.
We're trying to finalize our 2026 OKRs and strategy, also finishing up performance reviews and all of that.
So just hustling until before everyone leaves for the holidays.
Nice, nice.
Yeah, it's like the gates of 2025 are closing.
Yeah, we're all just trying to rush to the finish.
Well, I heard great things from Bridget about you.
Also, I think you're like blocks away from the office or something she said.
Yeah, I'm walking distance from you guys.
So pretty close by.
That is awesome.

Well, I know we reached out to you, but we'd love to just get maybe as a starting point, a little bit of like your journey in your own words, as well as like anything that has so far either peaked here.
interest as to why, you know, we're still talking.
But maybe that could be a good starting point.
Yeah, sounds great.
And there's a lot of things I would like to say in terms of my excitement.
But I'll first start off with a little background myself.

So I started my career in consulting and go-to-market strategy and ops with really, I would say, my sweet spot being translating vision into strategic priorities and operational plans and actually executing on them.
And I was fortunate to have the opportunity to serve as the chief of staff.
I'm starting a couple of years ago, where in my previous role, I served as the chief of staff to the VP of go-to-market enablement and ops.
And then currently, I'm the chief of staff for the CEO.
So at Rasa, I would say my role is really serving as that liaison between my CEO and the ELT or the executive team, as well as between my CEO and the rest of the company.

So my scope includes owning our annual planning process of setting the company strategy and all of my CEO's communications, both internal, external, customer executive briefings, driving operating rhythms.
So this includes owning board meetings, all hands, ELT weekly meetings, and offsites and so forth.
And then lastly, I would say there's a catch-all bucket where the chief of staff jumps in to where I've helped drive a range of like ad hoc strategic projects and initiatives.
this is really important.
Where the function hasn't been fully built yet at our company or lean and scrappy or where they just need more hands on deck.
So I think the reason why I want to continue in this type of role in this chief of staff role is I see.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Initial interview with Jane Suk for the Chief of Staff role.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jane Suk has a consulting background in GTM strategy and ops, with current experience as Chief of Staff (CoS) to the CEO at Rasa.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Her CoS role at Rasa is broad, covering strategic planning, communications, operating rhythms, and ad-hoc projects for under-resourced functions.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Suk is interested in the role because it aligns with her goal of continuing in a CoS capacity, leveraging her expertise in translating vision into execution.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)

## Topics

### Jane Suk's Background & Experience

  - [**Career Path:** Consulting → GTM Strategy & Ops → Chief of Staff.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Core Skill:** Translating vision into strategic priorities and operational plans, then executing on them.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**CoS Roles:**](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Previous: CoS to VP of GTM Enablement & Ops.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Current: CoS to the CEO at Rasa.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### Current CoS Role at Rasa

  - [**Function:** Serves as the primary liaison between the CEO and the Executive Leadership Team (ELT), and between the CEO and the rest of the company.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Key Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Strategic Planning:** Owns the annual planning process and company strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Communications:** Manages all CEO communications (internal, external, customer briefings).](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Operating Rhythms:** Owns key meetings and events:](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
          - [Board meetings](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
          - [All-hands](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
          - [ELT weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
          - [Offsites](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [**Ad-hoc Projects:** Drives strategic initiatives for under-resourced or lean functions.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel Santilli:** Continue the interview to explore Suk's interest in the role and specific qualifications.](https://fathom.video/share/uCy6_jDS1bKzqB4T-2bKquaRLyqfBTNz?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
